programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: After shedding their restrictive religious past in Utah, a couple's ready to start fresh in Rincón, Puerto Rico. They're hunting for a fantasy home to serve as their personal paradise where they can unleash the passions they've always kept hidden.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: A couple have quit their jobs, sold their house, and they're ready to leave the rat race for St. Thomas, Virgin Islands. One has champagne taste and is out to splurge, but the other is budget-conscious and wants to put a cork in the spending.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple looks for a home that matches their quirky personalities in Upstate New York; he's a music producer and wants space to build a recording studio, but she's more concerned with finding a house that's suited to start their family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Rock the Block
programme.desc: It's Week Four, and teams head into their multi-generation suites to create one-of-a-kind spaces; they're tasked with juggling a new design twist: adding something new, old, borrowed or blue; everyone gets to judge each other's work!

programme.desc: After shedding their restrictive religious past in Utah, a couple's ready to start fresh in Rincón, Puerto Rico. They're hunting for a fantasy home to serve as their personal paradise where they can unleash the passions they've always kept hidden.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After years of helping lucky lottery winners find their personal dream homes, David Bromstad reveals even more of what a luxurious lifestyle can provide -- including a dream home of his very own!

programme.title: Bachelor Mansion Takeover
programme.desc: Bachelor Nation's top designers and renovators face the ultimate challenge, transforming shared bedrooms into stylish retreats; with rising tension, bold risks, and shocking eliminations, alliances are formed as pressure mounts at each turn.

programme.title: Holmes Family Rescue
programme.desc: A family is left financially drained and with an unfinished, dangerous mess after a contractor abandoned their two-story addition project; Mike, Sherry and Michael must contend with the triple threat of plumbing, electrical and HVAC issues.

programme.title: Holmes Family Rescue
programme.desc: Homeowners are left financially strapped after a contractor abandoned their basement addition project, leaving them with a hazardous home; Mike, Sherry and Michael must now contend with unmovable bulkheads, unsightly posts and a bumpy floor.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Holmes Family Rescue
programme.desc: Homeowners had big plans to build a basement apartment for his aging mom, but a crooked contractor left them with a dangerous mess; Mike, Sherry and Michael step in to help and are shocked to find live wires, sloppy framing and dangerous gas leaks.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Holmes Family Rescue
programme.desc: A neighborhood couple renovate their friends' homes, but health issues have now retired their efforts; faced with challenges in their own small bungalow, Mike, Sherry and Michael step in and discover dangerous structural issues.

programme.title: HGTV Smart Home 2026
programme.desc: HGTV Smart Home 2026 is a resort-inspired escape in Orlando, Florida!

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: A couple dreams of more space for their two kids and two horses, so they are moving to an equestrian neighborhood with a community stable.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: Although a couple wants to downsize, they still need a home big enough to host their large dance parties; with a unique design style in mind, Brian and Mika look to build them a cultural and sexy house that sweeps them off their feet.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: After 20 years of international deployment, a Black Hawk helicopter pilot and his wife are eager to touch down and finally settle in their Florida hometown; they're calling on Brian and Mika to fit their European tastes into a forever family home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: A professional chef and his wife are trading snowy Boston for sunny Florida; but when the kitchen of his dreams is far from a reality, Brian and Mika are left trying to cook up a plan to keep things from boiling over.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: Newlyweds trade in their double-wide for a dream home fit for their family; juggling wedding plans and bold design ideas isn't easy, so Brian and Mika look to help them build a forever home and find wedded bliss along the way!

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
programme.desc: A large family searches for an affordable waterfront home in Cape Coral, Fla; they balance a tight budget and specific demands against the challenges of the competitive local housing market.

programme.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
programme.desc: A fireman and a nurse, who are a father-daughter duo, search for a coastal home in St. Augustine, Fla; they seek a property for sunsets and barbecues while balancing their different styles.

programme.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
programme.desc: Lovebirds share a dream of joining their families on a slice of coastal paradise in Norfolk, Virginia; they're ready to wade through bayside views to find a beach house bargain, but his dock-side dad jokes may clash with their straight-laced agent.

programme.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
programme.desc: A powerhouse fighting duo exits the ring to find an affordable seaside retreat in Myrtle Beach; the house hunt becomes a literal sparring match as they debate pantry space and square footage.

programme.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
programme.desc: A couple's ready to slow things down and find their seaside sanctuary in Astoria, Oregon; despite the low beach house prices, one of them has a renovation wish list that keeps rising, and it may threaten to swell costs beyond their budget.

programme.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
programme.desc: A Texas family explores the shores of North Padre Island searching for an affordable dream home; they navigate their set budget to find hidden real estate gems that accommodate their large family.

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: Kamohai and Tristyn put their all on the line as they attempt their priciest flip to date.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: With rotting floors, rats, and roaming chickens, Kamohai and Tristyn make an offer on the worst house they've ever seen. The deal falls out of escrow and returns at a bargain price, and now, they must transform this total disaster into a dream home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: Deep in the French countryside, a local expert helps a mother and daughter duo hunt bargain properties in Carcassonne; mom's looking to start a new life in a beautiful home and the search includes medieval castles, antique fairs, and some fine cheese.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: On the northwest coast of Spain, a relocation expert guides a young couple searching for a dream bargain home in Galicia; they're taking in all the local culture of the region as they enjoy the natural thermal spas and learn how to make cheese!

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: After eight years together in Montreal, a creative couple looks to refocus on growing their art in Copenhagen, Denmark. They're looking for a modern apartment near the city center, but with a small budget, they may need to compromise on location.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters Australia
programme.desc: Clare and her best friend Brid are on a mission to find Clare's family a home in Western Sydney. Clare wants room for her kids to grow, while eagle-eyed Brid focuses on the little details.

programme.title: House Hunters Australia
programme.desc: Bridget wants a Hamptons-style cottage with a pool, while Paul seeks a home with character and a toolshed; will they find their dream home?

programme.title: House Hunters Australia
programme.desc: Matt seeks a workshop for his many projects, while Mel dreams of a spacious, character-filled home with guest accommodation; together, they search for a property that fits both visions.

programme.desc: The nine remaining contestants get new teammates and a new challenge: renovating the iconic Rose Ceremony Room; new alliances are forged but the Golden Screwdriver will change the game in a shocking twist.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Ben and Erin help a family move from a Laurel suburb to the countryside and create a new home; the Napiers aim to design a place with ample outdoor space for the kids, along with a treehouse.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A couple lives in a house that once belonged to her grandmother, and with a large family that often visits, they're ready to make big upgrades; Ben and Erin add a much-needed additional bathroom as well as an outdoor kitchen.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A woman has completely turned her life around and looks to begin a new chapter with buying her first house; Ben and Erin create a home for her and her son with a big front porch and a laundry room, a luxury she's never had.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Ben and Erin take on a Laurel home, bringing it back to the 1950s from its original 1970s style; blending retro with modern updates, the Napiers look to create a space for a well-known Laurel couple.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: After completing the top floor of a local architect's downtown loft, Ben and Erin return to update the second floor after a fire; Erin steps outside her comfort zone to design a modern kitchen, entertainment room, and guest suite.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer
programme.desc: Jon and Kristina are tasked with combining all their clients' requests, including an old-world kitchen, a moody club room and a country club exterior into a single, cohesive home.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer
programme.sub-title: East Coast Farmhouse, West Coast Vibes
programme.desc: It's the newest renovation yet as Jon Knight tackles a 50-year-old Colonial reproduction; the home needs major help, so Jon and Kristina bring in a bright West Coast design, adding much needed natural light, a vaulted ceiling and a dream mudroom.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer
programme.sub-title: Return of the Salem Witch Trial House
programme.desc: Jon and Kristina are back at the John Proctor house after a devastating pipe break wreaks havoc on the home's first floor. After tackling the mold, they work with elements of home's history to create a modern design while embracing its historic past.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer
programme.desc: A clam shack once residing on a nearby island was transformed into a home; Jon and Kristina come to the rescue and pull from its seaside history to create a bright space that's perfect for humans and felines alike.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: An Olympic medalist bought what turned out to be a bad flip, and now after several DIY attempts, she's calling on Jasmine to help; Jasmine has $175,000 to bring this lemon back to life, all while juggling motherhood and her new business in Utah.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.sub-title: Help! We Bought a House as Is!
programme.desc: A couple returns to Utah to be near their blended family, but a health scare and a half-gutted fixer-upper puts their dream home on hold; Jasmine steps in to rescue the project and create the safe, welcoming home they've been dreaming of.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: A couple has taken their property on a wild ride, and for the second time, they want to convert their duplex into a single-family home; Jasmine aims to rescue the project and turn it into the dream home they've been chasing.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: Jasmine returns to help a couple convert their duplex into a single-family home; with just eight weeks left on the clock and the kitchen and kids' rooms in chaos, Jasmine races to deliver a dream home before time and money run out.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: A spicy California couple, who have been together since their teens, are ready to heat things up with a bold move to Roatán, Honduras; they're all in, but they have opposing ideas on what they want for their new island dream home.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: After shedding their restrictive religious past in Utah, a couple's ready to start fresh in Rincón, Puerto Rico. They're hunting for a fantasy home to serve as their personal paradise where they can unleash the passions they've always kept hidden.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: A couple have quit their jobs, sold their house, and they're ready to leave the rat race for St. Thomas, Virgin Islands. One has champagne taste and is out to splurge, but the other is budget-conscious and wants to put a cork in the spending.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Two picky parents look for a larger home with space for their two kids and rescue pup in Alabama; they find themselves outbid and stuck in real estate purgatory, which is partly due to their struggle to compromise.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: In for the Long Haul on Long Island
programme.desc: A couple is ready to take their relationship to the next level, so they search for a home to share on Long Island, N.Y.; he's looking to buy an old fixer, but she wants to spend their max on something turnkey that's near her mom.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: A Bear of a House Hunt
programme.desc: A Florida couple sold their home faster than expected, and now they're in a hurry find a new place in Sarasota. One's looking for turnkey at under a million, but the other wants to spend more on something that will give them the best return.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: After getting divorced, a couple decides to get back together and do things different with the perfect house in Houston; she wants a place that's completely move-in-ready; he thinks their relationship is strong enough to handle some projects.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A California couple look to relocate for his job, so they search for a home in Richmond, Va.; she wants to buy one of the area's vintage charmers, but he's more practical-minded and thinks newer is better.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A single woman leaves behind her city life in Brooklyn, N.Y., for the affordability of Knoxville, Tenn.; she's dreaming of a vintage home with character, but her sister is along to keep her from looking past the real concerns of an old home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
